description: Validation rules for a news-digest profile and run config. A profile under references/profiles/ should declare these fields; the engine validates against them before Phase 1.

must_cover.note: tiered entity lists (tier1 always-check, tier2 standard+, tier3 if surfaced)

meta_sources.note: changelog/release/aggregator sources WebFetched in the changelog sweep

source_tiers.note: optional concrete Tier-1..4 domains for the topic

rules: period_end must not be in the future (cap to today)
mode auto-derives from period length unless set explicitly: <=2wk QUICK, 1-3mo STANDARD, >3mo QUARTERLY
formats must be a subset of ['md','docx']; 'md' is always produced
company/competitive context must come from a LOCAL (unpublished) profile, never a shipped one
